---
name: obligatory_mermaid_architecture_doc_sync
description: Keep architecture documentation synchronized with code using Mermaid diagrams. Use whenever architecture-relevant code or structure changes.
---

# Obligatory Mermaid Architecture Documentation Sync

When creating or updating architecture documentation:
- include a high-level system context diagram
- include a component/module interaction diagram
- include a runtime flow diagram
- keep Mermaid nodes aligned with real package/module/service names in code
- update diagrams whenever architecture-relevant code changes
